name: deuz-sdk
description: Deuz SDK monorepo — @deuz-sdk/core (pure, web-first, multi-provider AI SDK) + @deuz-sdk/react.
author: Umutcan Edizaslan (U-C4N)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @deuz-sdk/core && npm run build -w @deuz-sdk/react
scripts.verify:docs: npm --prefix docs run types:check && npm --prefix docs run build
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run test:types && npm run build && npm run verify:package && npm run verify:runtime && npm run verify:size && npm run verify:api
scripts.release:verify: npm run check && npm run verify:docs
